mapper.select: SELECT p.id AS cv_id, p.user_id, p.full_name, p.title, p.birthday, p.phone, p.email, p.github_url, p.linkedin_url, p.website_url, p.address, p.summary_short, p.summary_long, p.avatar_url, p.status AS cv_status, p.is_public, p.view_count, p.published_at, p.deleted_at, p.created_date AS cv_created_date, p.updated_date AS cv_updated_date, s.id AS skill_id, s.skill_category, s.skill_name, s.skill_level, s.display_order AS skill_display_order, s.created_date AS skill_created_date, e.id AS edu_id, e.school_name, e.major, e.degree, e.gpa, e.description AS edu_description, e.start_date AS edu_start_date, e.end_date AS edu_end_date, e.created_date AS edu_created_date, pr.id AS project_id, pr.project_name, pr.company_name, pr.team_size, pr.role_in_project, pr.tech_frontend, pr.tech_backend, pr.tech_devops_tools, pr.url_demo, pr.start_date AS project_start_date, pr.end_date AS project_end_date, pr.created_date AS project_created_date, pt.id AS task_id, pt.task_description, i.id AS interest_id, i.interest_name, i.display_order AS interest_display_order, i.created_date AS interest_created_date, c.id AS cert_id, c.cert_name, c.issuing_organization, c.issue_date, c.expiration_date, c.credential_id, c.credential_url, c.created_date AS cert_created_date, act.id AS activity_id, act.organization AS activity_organization, act.role AS activity_role, act.description AS activity_description, act.start_date AS activity_start_date, act.end_date AS activity_end_date FROM cv_profiles p LEFT JOIN cv_skills s ON s.cv_id = p.id LEFT JOIN cv_educations e ON e.cv_id = p.id LEFT JOIN cv_projects pr ON pr.cv_id = p.id LEFT JOIN cv_project_tasks pt ON pt.project_id = pr.id LEFT JOIN cv_interests i ON i.cv_id = p.id LEFT JOIN cv_certifications c ON c.cv_id = p.id LEFT JOIN cv_activities act ON act.cv_id = p.id WHERE p.id = ( SELECT p2.id FROM cv_profiles p2 JOIN users u ON u.id = p2.user_id WHERE u.username = #{username} AND p2.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND p2.is_public = TRUE AND p2.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY p2.created_date DESC LIMIT 1 )
SELECT p.id FROM cv_profiles p JOIN users u ON u.id = p.user_id WHERE u.username = #{username} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY p.created_date DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE cv_profiles SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{cvId}
